mapper.sql: c.`id`, c.`name`, c.`address`, c.`country`, c.`city`, c.`venue_status`, c.`approval_status`, c.`wechat_mini_program_name`, c.`photo_urls`, c.`description`, c.`created_by`, c.`reviewed_by`, c.`reviewed_at`, c.`rejected_reason`, u.`email` AS submitter_email, u.`display_name` AS submitter_name, u.`phone` AS submitter_phone
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM `ir_profile`.`courts` c LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = c.`created_by` WHERE c.`status` = 0
AND c.`approval_status` IN ('voided', 'rejected')
AND c.`approval_status` = #{status}
ORDER BY CASE c.`approval_status` WHEN 'pending' THEN 0 WHEN 'approved' THEN 1 WHEN 'voided' THEN 2 WHEN 'blacklisted' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, c.`reviewed_at` DESC, c.`name` ASC

SELECT
FROM `ir_profile`.`courts` c LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = c.`created_by` WHERE c.`id` = #{courtId} AND c.`status` = 0 LIMIT 1
